problem id: e40635a7
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) XOR SHL(5)

examples:
  10011111 -> 11011111
  11010111 -> 01001111
  11001110 -> 01011101
  00100011 -> 00100110
  01111110 -> 00111100
  00101111 -> 10111110
  10001101 -> 10111011
  11110001 -> 11000011

query: 10100111
predicted answer: 10101111
